templates.label: rate + driver
templates.text: We don't yet understand how fast/where/when [phenomenon] is changing or what is driving that change.

templates.label: trigger + conditions
templates.text: We don't yet understand what triggers [phenomenon] and under what conditions it accelerates or slows.

templates.label: A vs B interpretation
templates.text: It's unclear whether [observed signal] reflects [meaning/cause A] or [meaning/cause B].

good_examples: It's unclear whether [observed behaviour or signal] reflects [meaning A] or [meaning B].
We're seeing high trial rates but low repeat usage, but don't know what users find missing or disappointing.
We don't know how people think about personal finance tools outside of formal banking products.
avoid_examples: We need to launch feature X.
We should redesign the pricing page.

patterns.label: Empty draft
patterns.advice: Describe an uncertainty you don't yet understand — not a plan, tactic, or solution.

patterns.label: Too short
patterns.advice: Add what is changing or observed and what is unknown about why or under what conditions.

patterns.label: Solution bias
patterns.advice: Replace the solution / feature / tactic language with the underlying uncertainty it is meant to resolve.

patterns.label: Missing uncertainty
patterns.advice: Use uncertainty markers (don't know, unclear, uncertain, not yet understood) and name a driver, trigger or condition.

templates.label: invest vs pause
templates.text: Whether to invest in deeper exploration of this opportunity or pause until the key assumptions are clearer.

templates.label: continue vs redirect
templates.text: Whether our current direction is promising enough to pursue, or whether we should redirect to alternatives.

templates.label: narrow directions
templates.text: How to narrow the plausible directions before committing resources to one.

good_examples: Whether to invest in deeper exploration of this opportunity or pause further work until assumptions are clearer.
Whether our current direction is promising enough to pursue, or if we should redirect attention to alternative approaches.
How to narrow down the set of plausible directions before committing resources to one.
avoid_examples: Decide whether to launch the new pricing tier.
Pick which features to build next quarter.

patterns.label: Empty draft
patterns.advice: Describe a discovery-stage choice blocked by uncertainty — not an execution decision.

patterns.label: Too short
patterns.advice: Frame the choice in invest-vs-pause, continue-vs-redirect, or narrow-directions terms.

patterns.label: Solution bias
patterns.advice: Replace the feature / pricing / launch decision with the discovery-stage decision it should inform.

patterns.label: Missing uncertainty
patterns.advice: Make the choice contingent on what is still unknown (e.g. invest vs pause until we know more).
